description: The LegacyPanel component is used in old migrated legacy content UI.

fields.Style: The style that determines what this panel looks like.
fields.ShowHeader: Whether to show the panel title.
fields.ShowHandle: Whether to show the panel side bar bevel mesh.
fields.Padding: How much padding should be used from the edge to the inner content.
fields.ZPadding: How much the UI elements should float above the backing plate.
fields.Thickness: The thickness of the beveled panel mesh.
fields.WhiteList: Elements that should not be used in the bounds calculations.
fields.BlackList: Elements that should be used in the bounds calculations.
fields._material: The material being used for this panel.
fields._panelMesh: The mesh being used for this panel.
fields._panelPos: The position field of this panel.
fields._handleActive: The handle active field of this panel.
fields._headerActive: The header active field of this panel.
fields._handleMesh: The handle mesh of this panel.
fields._handlePos: The handle position of this panel.
fields._handleColliderSize: The handle collider size of this panel.
fields._headerTitleMesh: The title mesh of this panel.
fields._headerButtonMesh: The header button mesh of this panel.
fields._headerCollider: The header collider of this panel.
fields._headerPos: The header position field of this panel.
fields._headerTitlePos: The header title position of this panel.
fields._title: The title name of this panel.
fields._titleText: The text renderer that displays the title of this panel.
fields._indicatePrivate: Is used to change the colors of the panel to indicate that it is in userspace.
fields._titlePos: The position field of the title of this panel
fields._titleBounds: The bounds of the title of this panel.
fields._contentSlot: The content root slot of this panel.
fields._headerRoot: The header root slot of this panel.
fields._handleAnchorPoint: The side bar handle mesh's anchor point for this panel.
fields._handleAnchorPointPosition: The handle position field of this panel.
fields._titleButtons: The list of buttons that make up the panel's title.
fields._highlightedButton: The title button object for the currently highlighted button.
fields._pinButton: The title button object for the pin to user button.
fields.CloseOverride: A sync delegate that takes a LegacyPanel that overrides the handling of closing this panel.

methods.HeaderButtonTouched: Called when the header button is touched.
methods.OnClose: Called when the panel is closed.
methods.OnHide: Called when the panel is hidden by the user.
methods.OnParent: Called when the panel is pinned to the user via the pin button.
methods.OnUserspaceTransfer: Called when the panel is transfered from userspace to the currently focused world.
